mechanism_narrative: Persistently low federal funds rates reduce the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly supporting higher equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are negative in >55% of observations when FEDFUNDS stays below 0.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending economic contraction, triggering risk-off sentiment and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of triggered instances, or the signal loses predictive power with Rank IC < 0.03 during periods of rapid labor market recovery.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, driving corporate revenue growth expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive returns when CPIAUCSL growth exceeds 4%, or the interaction term coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates expanding manufacturing capacity and supply-side momentum, which supports near-term equity price appreciation over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The signal reverses direction during periods of supply chain bottlenecks, evidenced by negative 5-day returns in >50% of observations when INDPRO growth exceeds 2% month-over-month.

mechanism_narrative: Elevated consumer price inflation combined with near-zero policy rates compresses real yields and raises expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL exceeds 235 and FEDFUNDS remains below 0.25
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >65% of triggered instances, or the mechanism fails to predict returns when inflation expectations remain anchored below 2.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects sustained economic expansion and rising household income, which supports corporate earnings growth and yields positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive payroll growth coincides with negative 60-day returns in >55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Two consecutive quarters of negative real GDP growth confirm a technical recession, triggering widespread portfolio deleveraging and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 declines for two consecutive quarters
failure_condition: The signal fails to predict negative returns when fiscal stimulus exceeds 5% of GDP, or forward returns are positive in >50% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in industrial production and decreases in the unemployment rate signal robust economic momentum, driving short-term risk-on positioning and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal loses predictive power with Rank IC < 0.03 during periods of structural labor market mismatch, or 5-day returns are negative in >60% of triggered observations.
